name: cruise-data-api
title: CruiseFeed API: Real-Time Cruise Data & Pricing (REST)
description: Always-on REST API for normalized cruise inventory from 60+ lines (MSC, Royal Caribbean, Carnival, Norwegian, Princess, Disney and more): ships, sailing dates, itineraries, ports, lead-in pricing and price history. Query it live - no batch run, no scraping - powered by CruiseFeed (cruisefeed.io).
